sourceTitle: Guide for students: best practice when using Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generative AI is a permissible learning tool in higher education and can be cited as an information source. However, it is important to note that Generative AI is not a replacement for your thinking and originality.
evidenceLocator: Section: FAQs - How do I use generative AI responsibly?
